curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge commit fixing GHSA-j2x6-9323-fp7h. Five non-test source files were changed (noisy patch). Primary vulnerability location is _unpack_returndata in external_call.py, which failed to apply clamping to return data when used in complex expressions (e.g. convert(), concat()). It used _returndata_encoding() which returned JSON_ABI for JSON-imported interfaces, and the JSON_ABI encoding type caused needs_clamp in core.py to skip bounds validation for bytestrings entirely. The patch removes the JSON_ABI encoding type, fixes needs_clamp to always validate bytestring bounds, and rewrites _unpack_returndata to use needs_clamp and make_setter for strict unpacking. Locations derived from both the advisory description and the patch diff. Vulnerability class integer-overflow confirmed: CWE-190, advisory title is 'Integer bounds error in Vyper', and the fix adds missing integer/bytestring bounds clamping.
